_comment: Edit this file with the Admin Dashboard (admin/index.html). After saving, replace this file in the content/ folder and re-upload the site folder to Cloudflare Pages.

seo.title: Estrada Concrete Company LLC | Heavy Civil & Concrete Contractor | Hutchins, TX
seo.description: Estrada Concrete Company LLC delivers self-performed heavy civil construction across the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex — paving, underground utilities, site preparation, and concrete structures.
seo.ogTitle: Estrada Concrete — Self-Performed Heavy Civil, DFW
seo.ogDescription: Paving, underground utilities, site prep, and concrete structures. Self-performed across the DFW metroplex.

form.subject: New bid request — estradaconcrete.com
form._tip: After the first live submission, FormSubmit emails you an activation link plus a random alias. Paste the alias endpoint here (https://formsubmit.co/ajax/YOUR-ALIAS) so your email address is no longer visible in the page source.

stats.label: Self-performed core scopes — no chasing subcontractors
Metroplex-wide coverage, North-Texas based and operated
Compromises on safety, compaction, or finish quality
Bid and project response for owners and general contractors

safety.title: Built To Qualify.
safety.lead: Everything a general contractor or owner needs to prequalify Estrada — insurance, safety record, and capacity — in one place. Request our full prequalification package and we'll return it the same day.

credentials.label: Licensed & insured in the State of Texas — COI issued on request
Experience Modifier Rate — add your current EMR in the admin panel
Bonding capacity — add single / aggregate limits in the admin panel
General liability, auto & workers' comp coverage — limits on request

careers.lead: We hire operators, finishers, pipe crews, and foremen who take pride in the work. Steady DFW-area projects, self-performed scopes, and a crew that has your back.
